data.body:
AC amendment: Move test file to tests/unit/scripts/test-figma-api-fetch.sh (not tests/scripts/) to match the bash-script-test convention observed in tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh. Confirm auto-discovery picks it up or register it explicitly in the suite runner.

AC amendment: FA-4 env var naming — be explicit: script reads PAT from design.figma_pat config key (via read-config.sh) first, then falls back to FIGMA_PAT environment variable. Test must use the exact variable name FIGMA_PAT.
